mood: Airy, relaxed, refreshing, premium-but-approachable, unhurried, feel-good, and socially easy.
photography: Real lifestyle moments: café tables, coworking breaks, beach or park refreshment, hands sharing cans, flavour-led close-ups, and casual out-of-home scenes. People should look natural, relaxed, and health-conscious rather than posed like athletes or nightlife talent.
rejectLooks: Overly technical benefit grids as the main impression.
Generic wellness imagery with no taste or occasion specificity.
